title: helenia autumnalis
intro: Helenia autumnalis, also known as Autumn Gentian, is a flowering plant species native to the mountains of Europe and Asia. The plant's roots and rhizomes are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helenia autumnalis include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. The plant is prepared for use in herbal medicine through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
